segment.source: CUBIG launches SynTitan, an AI-ready Data OS designed to help enterprises transform data into actionable insights and accelerate AI-driven decision-making

segment.source:
SynTitan Launch: An AI-Ready Data OS for Enterprise Decision-Making

On January 30, CUBIG officially launched SynTitan, a Data OS that automatically transforms incomplete enterprise data into AI-Ready data, enabling faster and more reliable business decision-making ‚ÄĒ even without data science experts.

SynTitan is designed to generate a synthetic and refined data layer without directly accessing raw data, allowing organizations to run analytics, prediction, and simulation workflows immediately.


AI Agents Are Scaling ‚ÄĒ Data Readiness Becomes the Real Advantage

As AI agents move rapidly into enterprise environments, data readiness is becoming a key differentiator.

According to Gartner, AI Agents and AI-Ready Data are among the fastest-advancing technologies. Deloitte projects that by 2026, 75% of enterprises will invest in agentic AI, while IDC expects up to 40% of Global 2000 employees to collaborate with AI agents.

Across industries, AI is no longer experimental ‚ÄĒ it is becoming core enterprise infrastructure.

The Real Bottleneck in AI Adoption: Data Governance and Structure

Despite growing adoption, many organizations still struggle to operationalize AI.

The most common barriers include:

  • Lack of proper data governance and infrastructure

  • Fragmented data silos across teams

  • Data quality issues such as missing values, bias, and imbalance

  • Regulatory constraints around privacy and compliance

In many cases, enterprises have plenty of data ‚ÄĒ but not in a form that AI systems can safely or effectively use.

A Synthetic, AI-Ready Data Layer ‚ÄĒ Without Accessing Raw Data

SynTitan was designed to address this structural problem.

Using DTS-based synthetic data generation and transformation, SynTitan:

  • Restores data quality

  • Fills missing values

  • Preserves statistical distributions and correlations

  • Standardizes data into an AI-Ready synthetic data layer

This approach allows teams across the organization to work with the same analytical baseline, without exposing sensitive raw data.

Zero-Access Architecture for Enterprise AI Compliance

SynTitan adopts a Zero-Access security model:

  • Raw data remains entirely within the enterprise environment

  • External AI models and AI agents interact only with synthetic data

This architecture supports emerging regulatory requirements around transparency and safety, while enabling AI in the enterprise to scale responsibly.

Rather than limiting data usage due to risk, SynTitan enables organizations to use more data ‚ÄĒ securely.

Enabling AI for Data Analytics Across the Organization

With SynTitan, teams across the enterprise can perform advanced analytics that were previously restricted by privacy concerns:

  • Marketing teams can analyze customer behavior and simulate campaign outcomes

  • HR teams can predict attrition and model organizational changes

  • Finance and risk teams can detect anomalies and model transaction risk

  • Strategy teams can run scenario-based market simulations

SynTitan also automates AI-driven decision reports, reducing reporting cycles from weeks to hours.

A Scalable Environment for AI Agents and Data Strategy

SynTitan is not a fixed-function platform.

It is designed as a scalable AI and data operating environment, where domain-specific AI agents can run safely on top of a governed, synthetic data layer.

Currently, SynTitan is being validated in finance, insurance, and security sectors, with planned expansion into telecommunications and healthcare.

segment.source:
ūüéČ A milestone for CUBIG in AI-ready data and AI privacy

Hello from CUBIG, building a world where data can be used safely and confidently.

We‚Äôre excited to share that CUBIG has been selected for the 2026 Emerging AI+X Top 100, hosted by the Korea Artificial Intelligence Industry Association (AIIA).

This program highlights 100 high-potential AI companies driving innovation through cross-industry adoption and measurable impact.

For us, it‚Äôs a meaningful signal that AI success depends not only on models, but on data that is actually usable under real-world constraints.

We‚Äôll continue expanding our infrastructure to help organizations unlock value from data without compromising AI privacy.

ūüß† Why CUBIG was recognized: making data AI-ready in practice

CUBIG was recognized for transforming data blocked by quality issues and privacy regulations into AI-ready datasets that teams can use immediately.

At the center is DTS (Data Transform System), our synthetic data engine designed for operational deployment, not just experimentation.

DTS automatically diagnoses and corrects missing values, bias, and imbalance to improve model reliability.

It also manages rare edge cases statistically, helping teams address the long-tail scenarios that break AI performance in production.

By solving data usability at the source, DTS helps organizations move beyond PoC into scalable AI execution.

ūüĒź Zero-Access architecture with Differential Privacy by design

Data is often unusable because sharing or exporting it introduces leakage risk and re-identification concerns.

CUBIG addresses this with a Zero-Access architecture where original data does not leave the organization.

We combine this with Differential Privacy to mathematically control re-identification risk while preserving analytical utility.

This design supports regulated industries such as finance, healthcare, manufacturing, and the public sector.

DTS can generate and share synthetic data across tabular, text, image, and time-series formats within a single engine.

ūüß© A full data and AI privacy infrastructure portfolio

CUBIG goes beyond a single product by building an end-to-end data and AI privacy infrastructure layer.

Alongside DTS, our portfolio includes SynTitan for collaborative data workflows and decision-ready analysis.

LLM Capsule provides an AI privacy gateway for public LLM usage, helping teams prevent sensitive input exposure.

azoo extends the ecosystem as a synthetic data marketplace that connects supply and demand in a privacy-preserving way.

Together, these products connect internal data assets with external AI services while keeping compliance and AI privacy at the core.

ūüöÄ What‚Äôs next

Following this recognition, CUBIG will expand partnerships across finance, healthcare, manufacturing, and the public sector.

We will accelerate AI-ready data initiatives, strengthen go-to-market collaboration, and broaden ecosystem linkages through our marketplace approach.

Our goal remains consistent: help organizations unlock data value beyond regulatory and security barriers.

We believe trusted data infrastructure will define the next wave of AI+X innovation.

CUBIG will keep building the foundation that makes safe, scalable AI possible.

ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ Welcome from CUBIG: enabling safe data use in a regulated world

As data-driven innovation accelerates, organizations around the world face a common challenge: how to use data effectively without compromising privacy. In a recent Japanese media interview, CUBIG was introduced as a company tackling this challenge at its core.

The article highlights CUBIG‚Äôs mission to protect sensitive data while making it practically usable for analysis and AI development. Rather than treating privacy and utilization as opposing goals, CUBIG approaches them as two elements that must be designed together.

This philosophy sets the foundation for CUBIG‚Äôs technology and global strategy.

ūüĒź Zero-Access synthetic data as a structural solution

One of the key points emphasized in the interview is CUBIG‚Äôs Zero-Access architecture for synthetic data generation.

CUBIG creates high-fidelity synthetic data without directly accessing original datasets, preserving statistical characteristics while eliminating re-identification risk.

By applying Differential Privacy, the system maintains analytical value while structurally protecting personal and confidential information.

This approach supports tabular, text, image, and time-series data within a single framework.

It is particularly effective in highly regulated environments such as finance, healthcare, and the public sector.

ūü§Ė Practical AI adoption with LLM Capsule

The article also highlights LLM Capsule, CUBIG‚Äôs solution for secure use of generative AI. While many organizations want to adopt tools like ChatGPT or Claude, concerns around data leakage and internal network restrictions remain major barriers.

LLM Capsule allows enterprises to use large language models without sending sensitive data outside their environment.
Compared to building private LLMs, it significantly reduces cost and deployment time.

This positions CUBIG as a practical enabler of enterprise-grade generative AI adoption.

ūüďä Proven performance in public and private sectors

CUBIG‚Äôs synthetic data technology has already been validated across public and private sectors in Korea.
The system preserves over 99 percent of the original data‚Äôs statistical structure while correcting bias, imbalance, and missing values.

By treating synthetic data as a quality-improvement engine rather than a simple anonymization tool, CUBIG enhances AI training performance.

Use cases include document anonymization, policy simulation, internal AI deployment, and financial risk analysis.

Organizations value the ability to conduct AI analysis without exporting sensitive original data.

ūüĆć Expanding globally under diverse regulatory environments

The interview underscores that data protection challenges are not unique to Japan. In Europe, GDPR has accelerated demand for synthetic data and AI privacy technologies, leading CUBIG to establish a UK subsidiary.

In the United States, rapid adoption of generative AI is also increasing the need for data protection solutions.

CUBIG‚Äôs strategy focuses on adapting its technology to each region‚Äôs regulatory and industrial context.

Through this approach, the company aims to set a new global standard for safe data utilization.

ūüöÄ A vision for a connected and privacy-safe data ecosystem

CUBIG‚Äôs long-term vision is to create a world where data can be used freely without compromising security. Protection mechanisms should not create friction but instead enable confident collaboration and innovation.

By reconnecting previously unusable data to AI and analytics through synthetic data, CUBIG is building a new data environment.

The company aims not just to deliver products, but to establish a comprehensive data infrastructure ecosystem.

Together with global partners, including those in Japan, CUBIG plans to expand this vision worldwide.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

#CUBIG #SyntheticData #AIPrivacy #DataProtection #GlobalExpansion #JapanMarket #DifferentialPrivacy #GenerativeAI #SecureAI

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ Welcome to CUBIG ‚Äď making sensitive data usable without anxiety

As large-scale data breach incidents continue to rise, public and financial institutions are facing growing pressure to strengthen privacy controls while still moving forward with AI adoption.

In many cases, organizations have the data they need, but practical barriers such as PIA requirements, operational risk, and compliance uncertainty slow down real execution.

CUBIG presents a synthetic-data-driven strategy that allows institutions to address privacy risks structurally, not only procedurally.

By shifting high-risk processing areas away from original personal data, institutions can reduce exposure while keeping AI initiatives on track.

This update aligns with the 2025.10 revision of the PIA guidelines and the broader push for AI-ready, regulation-aligned data operations.


ūüö® Why PIA is changing: new AI evaluation items and rising breach risk

Recent breach reports have intensified public concern, especially as major incidents across telecom and card sectors have affected large populations.

Against this backdrop, the Personal Information Protection Commission and KISA released an updated Public Institutions PIA Guideline in October 2025.

The most notable change is the introduction of a dedicated AI evaluation area, covering privacy risks across both development and training stages as well as operational governance.

For large-scale or sensitive-data projects, the guideline emphasizes early assessment, technical safeguards, and credible alternative measures that reduce risk in practice.

This means institutions need not only documentation, but also an implementable method to lower risk while still enabling analysis and AI workflows.

ūüß© Synthetic data as a practical alternative for safe analysis and AI training

In parallel, the Personal Information Protection Commission has highlighted synthetic data through separate guidance on generation and usage.

Synthetic data can reproduce structural and statistical characteristics without directly using real data, enabling analytics, model training, and policy research with reduced leakage risk.

In other words, PIA identifies and quantifies risk, while synthetic data provides a concrete way to reduce that risk at the data layer.

For high-sensitivity domains, this approach makes it easier to move from ‚Äúrisk management on paper‚ÄĚ to ‚Äúrisk reduction by design.‚ÄĚ

CUBIG‚Äôs proposal is built around this shift, helping institutions adopt AI with confidence under tightening privacy expectations.

ūüĒź DTS: Non-Access architecture plus Differential Privacy for AI-ready datasets

CUBIG‚Äôs DTS is designed to help institutions replace high-risk processing areas identified during PIA with privacy-preserving synthetic datasets.

DTS follows a Non-Access architecture: original data remains inside the institution‚Äôs internal network while the system learns statistical patterns and generates entirely new synthetic data.

By combining this with Differential Privacy, DTS mathematically controls re-identification risk and supports compliance-ready operation for sensitive environments.

This approach is intended to align with key requirements across Korea‚Äôs data laws, the Personal Information Protection Act, and GDPR-level expectations.

The result is an AI-ready dataset that supports analysis and model development while keeping strict control over original sensitive data.

ūüďĄ SynData Report: quantitative evidence you can attach to PIA deliverables

DTS supports multiple data formats, including tables, text, images, and time-series data, reflecting real-world public and financial data complexity.

After generation, DTS automatically produces a SynData Report that measures statistical similarity, machine learning performance, and re-identification risk.

This gives institutions measurable evidence for both safety and utility‚ÄĒtwo areas that PIA deliverables increasingly require in concrete terms.

Instead of relying on narrative explanations alone, teams can provide metrics and verification outputs as part of their assessment documentation.

Over time, this improves internal review confidence and helps shorten the cycle from assessment to real deployment.

ūüöÄ Moving toward AI-ready public and financial operations, powered by infrastructure

CUBIG‚Äôs CEO Ho Bae noted that repeated large-scale breaches have increased concerns that PIA can become a documentation-only process if there is no practical way to reduce risk.

DTS addresses this gap by enabling institutions to build AI-ready synthetic data without using sensitive originals, and by generating verification outputs that can be attached directly to assessment reports.

CUBIG plans to expand PIA-linked synthetic data models through public-sector consulting, AI-ready dataset projects, and cross-organization synthetic data combination pilots.

By connecting regulation, assessment, and data operations into a single workflow, institutions can advance both compliance and digital transformation.

CUBIG will continue developing practical standards for trustworthy AI adoption in highly regulated environments.

ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #AIprivacy #PrivacyImpactAssessment #PIA #DifferentialPrivacy #PublicSectorAI #FinancialAI #AIReady

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ Welcome to CUBIG ‚Äď shaping the future of safe and intelligent public data

As governments worldwide shift toward AI-driven administration, the demand for public data that is both safe and immediately usable for machine learning continues to grow.

CUBIG is excited to introduce how DTS, our secure synthetic data infrastructure, is becoming a critical enabler for this transformation. With public institutions now required to open higher-value, AI-friendly datasets, synthetic data is emerging as the most practical path forward.

DTS supports this movement by ensuring that sensitive information never leaves the organization while still generating data suitable for analytics, policy modeling, and AI services.

ūüĒź A Policy Shift Toward Quality and AI-Readiness

The Ministry of the Interior and Safety recently surpassed 102,000 datasets on the Public Data Portal and announced a transition from large-scale disclosure toward high-value, AI-ready data.

New evaluation criteria introduced in 2025 include efforts to provide AI-friendly datasets and performance in pseudonymized or synthetic data opening. This effectively positions synthetic data as a requirement rather than an option.

However, many of the most valuable datasets‚ÄĒsuch as resident registration, healthcare, welfare, and civil complaints‚ÄĒcannot be opened due to privacy risks. In response, regulatory bodies including the Personal Information Protection Commission have issued guidelines endorsing synthetic data as a means to simultaneously protect personal information and enable meaningful public data usage.

Synthetic data is now recognized as the foundation for AI training, policy simulation, and public‚Äďprivate innovation.

ūüöÄ DTS: A Non-Access Infrastructure Purpose-Built for Public Institutions

CUBIG DTS is uniquely designed around a non-access architecture where original data never leaves the institution. Instead of exporting raw data, the system learns only statistical patterns and generates entirely new synthetic datasets within a secure internal environment.

Advanced techniques such as Differential Privacy mathematically control re-identification risk, enabling agencies to validate safety before publishing or sharing data. DTS also includes built-in tools to measure statistical similarity, model performance, and privacy risks, providing quantitative verification essential for government compliance.

This ensures alignment with Korea‚Äôs data protection laws, the Data 3 Act, and even GDPR-equivalent requirements, making DTS suitable for handling high-risk public datasets.

ūüí° One Platform for Tables, Text, Images, and Time-Series

DTS supports a wide range of public sector data formats including tabular administrative data, civil complaint text, medical and industrial images, and sensor or log-based time-series data.

This unified pipeline allows institutions to build AI-ready data lakes, prepare datasets for the Public Data Portal, and support joint research across ministries and external organizations.

By converting sensitive datasets into synthetic versions, agencies can safely accelerate projects involving cross-agency collaboration, predictive modeling, and service innovation.

This enables a level of data usability that traditional anonymization cannot match, positioning synthetic data as the new standard for public sector AI.

ūüĆć Expanding AI-Ready Public Data Across Central and Local Government

CUBIG has already validated DTS through projects in finance, defense, and public agencies. Moving forward, the company plans to integrate DTS with SynTitan and SynLake to provide tailored AI-ready packages for ministries and local governments.

CEO Ho Bae emphasized that the goal of public data opening is shifting from simply releasing data to providing data that AI can immediately use for real-world impact. DTS empowers public institutions to share data safely with private and research organizations while advancing their own AI-driven administrative services.

CUBIG will continue expanding demonstrations, AI-ready dataset projects, and cross-ministry synthetic data collaborations to help shape the future of government innovation.


ūüďé Read more

Read the full article(Click)ūüďį


#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #AIReady #PublicData #DifferentialPrivacy #GovTech #SynTitan #SynLake #TrustedAI

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ Welcome to CUBIG ‚Äď enabling safe and meaningful AI innovation

CUBIG is building a future where enterprises can fully leverage their data without facing the barriers of privacy regulations or data quality issues. Many organizations today possess vast amounts of information, yet they are unable to use it due to sensitive attributes, missing values, or inconsistent formats. SynTitan solves this long-standing challenge by generating synthetic data that removes risks while preserving analytical value. As demand for privacy-safe AI grows worldwide, we are excited to share how SynTitan is gaining strong traction across finance, defense, and global enterprise markets.

ūüĒź Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data With Real Analytical Power

SynTitan reconstructs enterprise datasets by correcting missing, biased, or imbalanced data and converting them into synthetic versions that maintain meaningful statistical patterns.

Unlike traditional anonymization, which often removes essential attributes and weakens data quality, SynTitan preserves structure, distribution, and contextual relationships. This enables organizations to use the synthetic datasets just like real ones for analytics, modeling, and simulation.

Statistical similarity reaches 93 to 98 percent, which means businesses can obtain reliable insights without handling actual personal information.

This approach significantly reduces legal risk while expanding the scope of data-driven projects that were previously blocked by privacy concerns.

SynTitan is becoming a foundational technology for companies seeking to safely accelerate AI adoption.

ūüöÄ Built on a Non-Access Architecture That Eliminates Exposure

One of SynTitan‚Äôs strongest differentiators is its non-access architecture. Original data does not leave the organization, and external operators cannot access it at any stage of processing.

This design is essential for industries such as finance, healthcare, and defense, where security regulations are stringent and compliance risks are high.

By keeping sensitive information confined to a controlled environment while still producing high-quality synthetic datasets, SynTitan enables secure collaboration across business units.

Enterprises can build, test, and deploy AI models without waiting for complex approval steps, dramatically accelerating digital transformation.
For organizations managing high-risk data, SynTitan offers a safe and practical path forward.

ūüĆć Proven Through 20+ PoC Collaborations in Korea and Abroad

SynTitan has completed more than 20 PoC projects with leading institutions including NH NongHyup Bank, Samsung Securities, and the Korean Air Force.

NH NongHyup Bank, in particular, selected CUBIG through an open innovation program to support AI enhancements in anti-money laundering and risk management workflows.

These collaborations demonstrate that synthetic data is no longer a theoretical concept but a practical and scalable solution for real operational environments.

At global exhibitions, international organizations and enterprises have shown increasing interest in PoC and investment discussions.

A recent example is UK venture capital firm IONASTA, which discovered CUBIG at a Middle East tech event and proceeded with an investment‚ÄĒillustrating SynTitan‚Äôs global market potential.

ūüí° Technical Expertise Driving Global Recognition

CUBIG‚Äôs co-CEO Ho Bae brings deep research expertise, spanning computer science and cryptography at UCL, AI security research at Seoul National University, and academic leadership as a professor at Ewha Womans University. Over a decade of research is reflected in SynTitan‚Äôs robust architecture and enterprise-ready capabilities.

As a result, the solution resonates strongly in markets with strict privacy regulations, especially across Europe, where GDPR compliance is essential.

CUBIG expects meaningful revenue growth beginning next year, driven primarily by overseas adoption.
The company is now establishing a UK entity to accelerate customer acquisition and strengthen its presence in the region.

ūüďą Advancing Toward Global Leadership in Privacy-Safe AI

With growing demand for ethical and privacy-preserving AI solutions, CUBIG is positioned to become a global leader in synthetic data technologies.

The company‚Äôs combination of synthetic data generation and differential privacy is rare even among global competitors, providing a strong advantage in regulated industries.

CUBIG‚Äôs vision is to expand SynTitan into more international markets while pushing forward a future where organizations can use data freely and safely.

By turning advanced research into real-world impact, CUBIG continues to shape the global movement toward trustworthy AI.

ūüĆĪ Welcome to CUBIG ‚Äď enabling safe and meaningful AI innovation

CUBIG is building a future where enterprises can fully leverage their data without facing the barriers of privacy regulations or data quality issues. Many organizations today possess vast amounts of information, yet they are unable to use it due to sensitive attributes, missing values, or inconsistent formats. SynTitan solves this long-standing challenge by generating synthetic data that removes risks while preserving analytical value. As demand for privacy-safe AI grows worldwide, we are excited to share how SynTitan is gaining strong traction across finance, defense, and global enterprise markets.

ūüĒź Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data With Real Analytical Power

SynTitan reconstructs enterprise datasets by correcting missing, biased, or imbalanced data and converting them into synthetic versions that maintain meaningful statistical patterns.

Unlike traditional anonymization, which often removes essential attributes and weakens data quality, SynTitan preserves structure, distribution, and contextual relationships. This enables organizations to use the synthetic datasets just like real ones for analytics, modeling, and simulation.

Statistical similarity reaches 93 to 98 percent, which means businesses can obtain reliable insights without handling actual personal information.

This approach significantly reduces legal risk while expanding the scope of data-driven projects that were previously blocked by privacy concerns.

SynTitan is becoming a foundational technology for companies seeking to safely accelerate AI adoption.

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ A New Era of Safe and Smart Public Data Use

CUBIG is pleased to share that DTS, our synthetic data infrastructure solution, is emerging as a key platform for government agencies seeking safe and scalable ways to open public data.

As data-driven administration accelerates, agencies face the challenge of enabling AI innovation while maintaining strict privacy protection. DTS was designed to solve exactly that.


ūüĒź From Volume to Quality: Shifting Standards in Public Data Opening

In 2025, the Ministry of the Interior and Safety added a new evaluation criterion for agencies that open pseudonymized or synthetic data.

Although more than 102,000 datasets are available on the Public Data Portal, the most valuable datasets‚ÄĒcovering resident registration, healthcare, welfare, and civil services‚ÄĒremain closed due to privacy risks.

Government bodies and KISA now highlight synthetic data as the key technology that enables both safe public data opening and AI adoption.


ūüöÄ DTS: A Non-Access Architecture for High-Risk Public Data

DTS ensures that original data stays inside the agency at all times. Built on a Non-Access structure, it prevents external operators from viewing or handling real data while enabling secure transformation into synthetic form.

Differential Privacy is applied to mathematically control re-identification risks. With support for tabular, text, image, and time-series formats through a unified pipeline, DTS is optimized for the diverse nature of public-sector data.


ūüí° Enabling Public Data Opening, Joint Research, and Cross-Agency Collaboration

By transforming high-risk datasets into synthetic versions, agencies can finally open valuable data on the Public Data Portal, support joint research with private and academic sectors, and enable cross-agency data combination projects.

DTS not only supports compliance with the new evaluation index but also accelerates data-driven policymaking and AI service deployment.


ūüĆć Expanding Toward Public-Sector Synthetic Data Workspaces

CUBIG has already proven its capabilities through pilot projects in finance, public services, and defense. DTS will continue to expand through integration with SynTitan and SynLake to provide customized synthetic data workspaces for central and municipal government agencies.

CEO Ho Bae emphasized that the goal is not to open more data, but to open it safely in a form that AI can use‚ÄĒsetting the stage for expansion into global public-sector markets under GDPR-level regulations.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį


#CUBIG #DTS #SyntheticData #PublicData #DataDrivenGovernment #AIprivacy #SynTitan #SynLake #GovTech #DifferentialPrivacy

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ Welcome to CUBIG ‚Äď creating a world where AI innovation stays safe

CUBIG is excited to share that we have been selected as one of six finalists in the 2025 AI Collabo Open Ground program hosted by the Jeju Center for Creative Economy and Innovation. Designed in collaboration with DB Insurance, Chokwang Paint, and Hana Bank, the program aims to accelerate AI-driven innovation through real industry challenges and open collaboration.

ūüöÄ Accelerating Innovation Through Cross-Industry Collaboration

Earlier this year, the participating organizations identified shared AI challenges across insurance, manufacturing, and finance. After multiple offline meetups and technical discussions, six promising startups were chosen as official collaborators for 2025.
The initiative focuses on solving practical problems and developing deployable AI solutions that strengthen each company's digital transformation roadmap.

ūü§Ě CUBIG x DB Insurance: Advancing Secure LLM Capsule

CUBIG will partner with DB Insurance to advance LLM Capsule for large-scale data anonymization and safe GPT utilization.
LLM Capsule acts as a real-time security gateway that detects and anonymizes sensitive information during public LLM use. This ensures that enterprises in highly regulated environments can adopt generative AI without exposing confidential data.
The collaboration will explore secure document processing, summarization, and insurance-specific AI workflows optimized for real operational environments.

ūüí° Program Timeline and Future Opportunities

All selected startups will work with their matched corporate partners through December to perform technical tests and develop solutions.
Depending on performance, follow-up opportunities such as purchase agreements, investment, and global expansion support may follow. Additional benefits include PoC funding, acceleration programs, global open innovation connections, and Jeju-based workation support designed to enhance creativity and collaboration.

ūüĆć Building a New AI Innovation Ecosystem in Jeju

The AI Collabo Open Ground represents the first cross-industry collaboration model centered around AI for the Jeju Center. By connecting regional industries with emerging AI companies, the program aims to expand a sustainable innovation ecosystem.
CUBIG is proud to contribute by providing secure, enterprise-ready AI infrastructure that enables organizations to adopt AI responsibly and effectively.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ Welcome to CUBIG ‚Äď where safe and intelligent data use begins

CUBIG is building a world where organizations can unlock AI innovation without ever exposing sensitive information. With the rise of global data regulations, we are excited to share how our latest technologies are helping industries adopt high-performance AI safely and effectively.


ūüöÄ Unlocking AI Performance Without Accessing Original Data

Many AI systems today rely on only a fraction of available data due to strict privacy rules. CUBIG addresses this limitation with synthetic data that achieves up to 99 percent performance similarity while ensuring that no real personal information is ever accessed.

Our DTS (Data Transform System) generates high-quality multimodal synthetic data including tabular, text, image, and time-series formats, enabling safe AI training and analysis across finance, healthcare, public agencies, and defense.


ūü§Ė SynTitan and LLM Capsule: A New Model of Safe Data Collaboration

SynTitan is CUBIG‚Äôs synthetic-data-driven collaboration platform that allows organizations to safely clean, combine, analyze, and share sensitive information internally. With no-code accessibility, anyone can use tools such as analyze data securely.

LLM Capsule acts as a secure AI gateway that detects and anonymizes sensitive information during public LLM usage, ensuring safe AI adoption even in isolated or restricted environments.


ūüĆć Technology Recognized and Adopted Across Industries

CUBIG has filed eight domestic patents and two international patents while collaborating with major institutions including SK Telecom, Hana Bank, Woori Bank, Naver Cloud, national defense agencies, and leading hospitals. Several projects have completed PoC stages and are progressing toward full deployment.


Our data marketplace, Azoo, also enables companies to generate, trade, and acquire synthetic datasets securely, expanding the possibilities of data-driven business.


ūüí° Toward Becoming the World‚Äôs Leading Synthetic Data Platform

CUBIG is actively expanding into Europe and North America through SEO-driven outreach, global data partnerships, and broader B2B integrations. Our mission is to set a new standard for AI ethics, privacy protection, and practical AI adoption in a world where data cannot be freely shared.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüĆĪ CUBIG Growing in Jeju‚Äôs Innovation Hub

CUBIG is expanding its technological footprint from its Seoul headquarters to its Jeju branch at the Route330 Innovation Center. Jeju‚Äôs advanced science park aims to become the Silicon Valley of Korea, and CUBIG is contributing by providing technologies that address one of the nation‚Äôs most important challenges: enabling the safe and lawful use of high-quality data in the AI era.

ūüĒź Turning 12 Percent Usable Data Into 99 Percent Insight

Today‚Äôs AI systems often rely on only a small portion of available data because most real-world information contains sensitive elements that cannot be freely processed. CUBIG developed secure synthetic data technology that allows AI learning and analysis without accessing original data, preserving model performance while eliminating privacy risks. This innovation unlocks data hidden behind restrictions and is applicable in fields such as healthcare, finance, statistics, and defense.

ūüöÄ Proven in Real-World Use, Not Just in Concept

CUBIG‚Äôs synthetic data models maintain over 99 percent of the performance of real data while providing insights with significantly reduced bias. Its flagship platform, X-PERT, is already used in practical scenarios such as fraud detection in financial institutions, HR simulations, and policy impact forecasting.
With strong momentum, CUBIG has completed a successful Series A round, achieving a cumulative investment of 9 billion KRW. The company holds domestic and international patents, multiple government awards, and partnerships with major organizations including Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, SK Telecom, and public institutions like Gangnam District Office.

ūüŹÜ Competing on the Global Stage

CUBIG was selected as the Seoul champion of Startup World Cup 2025 and will represent Korea in the Silicon Valley Grand Finale. The company will also participate in the EWC Championship held in Saudi Arabia, competing among the world‚Äôs top 100 AI startups.

CEO Ho Bae shared that CUBIG aims to build a trust-based data ecosystem that protects both citizens and industries, positioning secure synthetic data at the center of future AI innovation.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

ūüöÄ Proven in Real-World Use, Not Just in Concept

CUBIG‚Äôs synthetic data models maintain over 99 percent of the performance of real data while providing insights with significantly reduced bias. Its flagship platform, X-PERT, is already used in practical scenarios such as fraud detection in financial institutions, HR simulations, and policy impact forecasting.
With strong momentum, CUBIG has completed a successful Series A round, achieving a cumulative investment of 9 billion KRW. The company holds domestic and international patents, multiple government awards, and partnerships with major organizations including Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, SK Telecom, and public institutions like Gangnam District Office.

ūüŹÜ Competing on the Global Stage

CUBIG was selected as the Seoul champion of Startup World Cup 2025 and will represent Korea in the Silicon Valley Grand Finale. The company will also participate in the EWC Championship held in Saudi Arabia, competing among the world‚Äôs top 100 AI startups.

CEO Ho Bae shared that CUBIG aims to build a trust-based data ecosystem that protects both citizens and industries, positioning secure synthetic data at the center of future AI innovation.

segment.source:
ūüáĮūüáĶ CUBIG Joins the KDB NextONE Business Meet-up in Tokyo

CUBIG participated in the KDB NextONE Business Meet-up held at Shibuya Scramble Square on October 20, connecting with Japanese enterprises seeking new ways to adopt AI safely. The event gathered ten Korean startups and a broad range of Japanese companies, offering a firsthand look at the challenges created by Japan‚Äôs strict data protection rules.

Many organizations expressed the same concern: they want to use AI, but sensitive data cannot leave internal systems or be processed externally. This restriction has slowed or halted many AI initiatives, especially in finance, healthcare, and the public sector. As a result, Japanese companies showed strong interest in methods that allow them to generate insights without exposing real data.


ūü§Ě Conversations That Revealed Real AI Barriers

During pre-arranged discussions, Japanese enterprises visited the CUBIG booth to openly share their obstacles. Some struggled with customer logs that contained sensitive information requiring slow approval processes. Others operated entirely inside isolated networks, making external AI integration nearly impossible.

When CUBIG introduced synthetic data as a way to reflect statistical and contextual patterns without accessing original data, many visitors were intrigued. The idea of performing analysis, prediction, and simulation inside non-export, fully restricted environments resonated strongly with their immediate needs.


ūüí° What Japanese Companies Need for AI Adoption

Through these conversations, several clear requirements emerged. Japanese organizations need a collaboration model that does not export sensitive information, an AI environment compatible with regulatory demands, simulation capabilities that work when real data is limited, and a fast, low-risk way to validate AI projects internally.

Synthetic data naturally addresses these needs, offering a practical and compliant pathway for AI adoption across Japan‚Äôs privacy-first landscape. The meet-up confirmed that synthetic data may serve as the missing foundation that allows Japanese enterprises to move forward with meaningful AI applications.


ūüďł A Positive Close in Tokyo

The event concluded with a group photo featuring both Korean startups and Japanese partners, capturing an atmosphere of shared optimism. Tokyo made one thing clear: Japan is ready for AI innovation but confined by strict data rules, and synthetic data may be the key that finally unlocks progress.

CUBIG will continue to work with partners in Japan and around the world to provide safe, effective, and future-ready ways to unlock the value of data in the AI era.


ūüďé Read more

Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüß† CUBIG CEO Ho Bae: ‚ÄúSecure Synthetic Data Is the Frontline of AI Privacy‚ÄĚ

Hello, we‚Äôre CUBIG, a leading company in synthetic data and AI privacy innovation.

In a recent interview with The Economist Korea, our CEO Ho Bae shared how CUBIG is building the ‚ÄúAI privacy vaccine‚ÄĚ ‚ÄĒ a technology that protects citizens‚Äô data while fueling global AI innovation.


ūüďį Redefining Privacy in the AI Era

As AI grows more powerful, the risk of personal data exposure increases dramatically.

CUBIG‚Äôs Secure Synthetic Data technology enables AI systems to learn and operate without ever accessing real-world data.

By generating high-fidelity synthetic datasets that mirror real distributions, CUBIG empowers organizations to innovate freely without compromising privacy or compliance.

‚ÄúTraditionally, people believed stronger privacy meant lower performance,‚ÄĚ said Bae.
‚ÄúOur mission was to prove that you can have both ‚ÄĒ protection and productivity.‚ÄĚ

This philosophy positions CUBIG as Asia‚Äôs most advanced AI privacy innovator.


ūüĆć Recognized by Gartner as a Global Innovator

In 2025, global research firm Gartner named CUBIG the only Asian vendor featured in its report, ‚ÄúEmerging Tech: Hyper-Synthetic Data.‚ÄĚ

Hyper-synthetic data combines domain-specific simulation, AI analytics, and built-in privacy protection ‚ÄĒ the next-generation foundation for safe and scalable AI.

Gartner predicts that by 2028, 80% of all AI data will be synthetic.

CUBIG‚Äôs technology is trusted by leading institutions such as Samsung, Naver Cloud, Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, and multiple government agencies, bridging the gap between strict data regulations and AI-driven innovation.


ūüßĎ‚Äćūüíľ ‚ÄúAI Privacy Is National Infrastructure‚ÄĚ

‚ÄúMany global platforms still use personal data for AI training,‚ÄĚ said Bae.
‚ÄúAt CUBIG, we see protecting citizens‚Äô data as a national responsibility ‚ÄĒ standing on the frontline of AI privacy for the people of Korea.‚ÄĚ

CUBIG‚Äôs flagship solutions ‚ÄĒ LLM Capsule (for real-time data anonymization) and DTS (Data Transform System) (for privacy-preserving AI learning) ‚ÄĒ demonstrate one clear principle:
trust is the true foundation of AI innovation.


‚úąÔłŹ Expanding Across the Globe

CUBIG was named the Seoul Winner of Startup World Cup 2025, earning the chance to compete in the Grand Finale in Silicon Valley.

The company will also represent Korea at the EWC 2025 in Saudi Arabia, joining the world‚Äôs top 100 AI startups.

With ‚ā©9 billion (USD 6.5M) in total funding and a new UK subsidiary, CUBIG is expanding across Europe and North America ūüĆć, positioning itself as a global leader in AI privacy and synthetic data technology.


ūüí° From Protection to Trust

‚ÄúAs AI continues to evolve, trust in data will define the strength of nations,‚ÄĚ said Bae.
‚ÄúAt CUBIG, we don‚Äôt just protect information ‚ÄĒ we build the foundation of AI privacy.‚ÄĚ

CUBIG remains committed to creating a world where AI innovation and privacy coexist, empowering progress through trust.


#CUBIG #AISyntheticData #AIPrivacy #HyperSyntheticData #StartupWorldCup #TrustedAI #DataIntegrity #AIInnovation


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüŹõÔłŹ CUBIG Joins Policy Roundtable on ‚ÄúGlobal Scale-Up for AI Startups‚ÄĚ

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leader in synthetic data and AI security.

On September 16, we participated in a roundtable co-hosted by Korea Startup Forum (KOSPO) and the National Assembly Startup Research Group Unicorn Farm.

The session gathered lawmakers and leading AI startups to discuss regulatory and policy challenges hindering global scale-up

ūüĒź CUBIG‚Äôs Key Message

Our CEO, Minchan Chung, emphasized the need to legally define synthetic data as an independent secondary output ‚ÄĒ not a derivative of personal information.

Current policies encourage data use but restrict the free distribution of synthetic data, creating contradictions.

By establishing a clear legal framework ‚öĖÔłŹ, synthetic data can be safely adopted across sensitive industries like healthcare ūüŹ•, finance ūüíį, and public services ūüŹõÔłŹ


ūüďĆ Why This Matters

The discussion highlighted that startups are not just beneficiaries but key drivers of innovation.

With targeted policies ‚ÄĒ such as:

  • easing cross-border data regulations ūüĆć

  • creating supportive tax benefits ūüí°

  • enabling sovereign fund investments ūüíĶ

‚ÄĒ Korea‚Äôs AI startups can accelerate their global expansion.

CUBIG remains committed to contributing to policy dialogues and providing technologies like synthetic data and LLM Capsule to help enterprises and governments safely embrace AI innovation worldwide


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüíį CUBIG Secures Series A Funding from Iona Star, Accelerating Global Expansion

Hello, we are CUBIG, a pioneer in AI security and synthetic data.

We‚Äôre excited to share that CUBIG has raised Series A funding from UK-based Iona Star LP and Korea‚Äôs Friend Investment Partners, bringing our cumulative funding to KRW 9 billion.

Beyond capital, this round represents a strategic partnership to accelerate our entry into Europe and North America ūüĆć


ūüöÄ Differential Privacy Meets Synthetic Data

CUBIG‚Äôs core innovation combines differential privacy with synthetic data, enabling AI training and analysis without ever exposing raw data.

Original datasets remain local, while only synthetic candidates are shared back ‚ÄĒ ensuring that sensitive information never leaves the owner‚Äôs environment.

This ‚Äúlearning without seeing the data‚ÄĚ approach addresses one of the biggest bottlenecks in AI adoption and empowers organizations across finance ūüí≥, healthcare ūüŹ•, and government ūüŹõÔłŹ to safely leverage their data.


ūüĒź X-PERT: Real-World Applications

Our flagship platform, X-PERT, supports multimodal, domainless synthetic data ‚ÄĒ including text, tables, images ūüĖľÔłŹ, and time-series.

It helps balance skewed datasets, augment rare events such as fraud detection in finance, and enables predictive simulations for HR or policy scenarios.

By safely integrating with LLMs ūü§Ė, X-PERT enhances AI performance while maintaining compliance.

As a field-proven solution, X-PERT goes beyond demo-stage technology and is already used in mission-critical environments.

‚úąÔłŹ Global Expansion and Vision

With this investment, CUBIG will:

  • Establish overseas subsidiaries starting in the UK

  • Prioritize go-to-market strategies for Europe

  • Strengthen sales and marketing capabilities

  • Secure top talent ūüĎ©‚ÄćūüíĽūüĎ®‚ÄćūüíĽ

Recognized with multiple patents, GS certifications, and government awards, CUBIG already partners with Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, and Gangnam District Office.

Our vision is to lead the global data governance market as a trusted data infrastructure company.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüĒź CUBIG Launches ‚ÄėLLM Capsule‚Äô Security Filter for Safe Enterprise Use of LLMs

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leader in AI security and synthetic data solutions.

We‚Äôre excited to announce the launch of LLM Capsule ‚ÄĒ an AI security filter that enables enterprises to safely adopt and use large language models (LLMs).

By automatically detecting and pseudonymizing sensitive information, LLM Capsule prevents data leaks while maintaining real-time performance ‚ö° for seamless collaboration.

ūüĒź Unmatched Security for Enterprise AI

Since its founding, CUBIG has applied Differential Privacy to ensure synthetic data generation without exposing personal information.

Building on this foundation, LLM Capsule extends our security expertise to enterprise LLM environments.

Whether using ChatGPT, Gemini, or Grok ūü§Ė, organizations can rely on LLM Capsule as a secure gateway ‚ÄĒ eliminating the need for expensive standalone deployments.


ūüöÄ Next-Generation Security Architecture

LLM Capsule goes beyond rule-based protection.

It leverages AI-driven contextual understanding to detect threats, integrates RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and SLLM (Self-contained LLM) to minimize risks, and delivers 0.09-second decryption speeds.

This design overturns the notion that ‚Äúsecurity slows productivity‚ÄĚ by ensuring enterprises can maintain both protection and efficiency.


‚úąÔłŹ Global Showcase at AWS Tech Summit

CUBIG will officially present LLM Capsule as a partner at the 2025 AWS Tech Summit (Sept 9‚Äď10), highlighting our technology to a global audience.

CEO Ho Bae emphasized:

‚ÄúLLM Capsule fulfills government security guidelines while giving enterprises the confidence to adopt productivity AI securely.‚ÄĚ

With this launch, CUBIG strengthens its leadership in AI privacy and security on the global stage.

segment.source:
ūüíį CUBIG Secures Series A Funding, Surpasses KRW 9 Billion in Total Investment

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leading company in AI security and synthetic data solutions.

We‚Äôre excited to announce that CUBIG has successfully closed its Series A round, bringing our total investment to over KRW 9 billion.

The round was co-led by UK-based Iona Star LP and Korea‚Äôs Friend Investment Partners, reflecting strong confidence in our technology and global growth potential.

ūüöÄ Why This Investment Matters

This funding validates that CUBIG‚Äôs technology and business model can thrive in the global market.

In particular, our differential privacy-based synthetic data platform is recognized as a unique solution in regions with stringent data regulations such as Europe‚Äôs GDPR.

Beyond capital, the investment represents a strategic partnership to accelerate our entry into Europe and North America.


ūüĒź CUBIG‚Äôs Core Product and Strengths

Our flagship product, X-PERT, is a no-code AI platform that generates and simulates multimodal synthetic data without accessing real data.

It has already been adopted by leading domestic clients such as Kyobo Life, IBK Bank, and Gangnam-gu Office.

With upcoming deployment on NAVER Cloud, we are expanding to SaaS-based services.

By covering the full cycle ‚ÄĒ generation, validation, trading, and application, CUBIG provides an integrated data ecosystem that maximizes customer value.


‚úąÔłŹ Global Expansion and Vision

The Series A proceeds will be invested in:

  • Establishing overseas entities in key markets like the UK

  • Strengthening sales and marketing capabilities

  • Securing top talent ūüĎ©‚ÄćūüíĽūüĎ®‚ÄćūüíĽ

We will also develop industry-specific AI agent models tailored for finance, public sector, and healthcare, while building a global infrastructure for secure and efficient AI data usage.

As CUBIG advances into Europe and North America ūüĆć, we remain committed to becoming a world-class AI data infrastructure company, empowering enterprises worldwide with safe and innovative synthetic data solutions.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüĆć CUBIG Recognized by Gartner as a Representative Vendor in Hyper-Synthetic Data

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leading company in secure synthetic data technologies.

We are proud to announce that CUBIG has been listed as a representative vendor in the Hyper-Synthetic Data category in Gartner‚Äôs latest report:
‚ÄúEmerging Tech: Provider Differentiation Strategy‚ÄďTrends for Hyper-Synthetic Data‚ÄĚ (June 2025).

Notably, CUBIG is the only Asia-based company to be included, underscoring both our technical strength and proven performance.



ūüĆć The Meaning of Hyper-Synthetic Data

According to Gartner, hyper-synthetic data goes beyond simple generated data to include domain-specific simulations, AI analytics, and built-in privacy protection.

The report predicts that by 2028, 80% of AI training data will be synthetic.

CUBIG was recognized for providing an integrated infrastructure that supports high-precision use cases such as strategic decision-making, medical trials ūüŹ•, and financial policy design ūüíį ‚ÄĒ all without accessing sensitive information.


ūüĒź CUBIG‚Äôs Differentiation and Strengths

CUBIG‚Äôs multimodal and domainless synthetic data technology supports text, tabular, image ūüĖľÔłŹ, and time-series formats.

By embedding Differential Privacy, we ensure end-to-end security throughout the generation process.

Our platform also generates AI agents capable of GPT-level analysis ūü§Ė, while security filtering at the input stage blocks personal or confidential information in public LLMs.

These strengths make CUBIG‚Äôs solutions highly applicable for regulated sectors such as finance, healthcare, and defense.


‚úąÔłŹ Global Expansion and Vision

Gartner highlighted CUBIG‚Äôs maturity as an integrated solution and emphasized its scalability in regulated industries.

CEO Ho Bae stated:

‚ÄúThis listing is not just a certification but an official validation of CUBIG‚Äôs capabilities on a global standard. We will accelerate expansion into Europe and North America and strengthen global partnerships.‚ÄĚ

With this recognition, CUBIG expects to leverage new opportunities in government procurement, corporate open innovation, and international investment.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüŹõÔłŹ LLM Capsule Selected as Public Procurement Innovation Product, Expanding CUBIG‚Äôs Reach into the Public Sector

We are pleased to announce that our flagship product, LLM Capsule, has been designated as a 2025 Innovation Product by the Public Procurement Service (PPS) of Korea.

Following its earlier selection for the SME Technology Pilot Purchase Program, this recognition underscores CUBIG‚Äôs technical excellence and innovation at the national level.

ūüĒź Technical Superiority of LLM Capsule

LLM Capsule automatically detects and de-identifies sensitive information contained in user inputs to public LLMs like ChatGPT, preventing external leakage at the source.

Designed as a local security agent, it operates seamlessly even in network-separated environments, safeguarding data directly on users‚Äô computing devices without relying on external servers.

This makes it highly suitable for sensitive government and public institution settings.


‚öôÔłŹ Differential Privacy for Security and Usability

Built with Differential Privacy (DP), LLM Capsule employs pseudonymization and restoration functions.

Only de-identified data is transmitted externally, while the original meaning can be restored internally, ensuring both strong security ūüĒí and practical usability.

This allows public institutions to securely leverage generative AI for tasks such as report writing ūüďĚ, civil service responses, and internal document management.


ūüďĆ Accelerating Public Sector Expansion

Once designated as an Innovation Product, public institutions can directly purchase LLM Capsule via the government‚Äôs procurement platform, with eligibility for sole-source contracts for three years.

This framework significantly lowers adoption barriers for innovative solutions.

According to CUBIG:

‚ÄúLLM Capsule is the only solution that ensures safe use of generative AI in network-separated environments, reducing risks of sensitive information leakage.‚ÄĚ

Moving forward, CUBIG will continue to advance AI innovation and data protection with our broader portfolio, including Synflow (data integration), Syndata (data validation), DTS (synthetic data generation), and Azoo (data marketplace).


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį


#CUBIG #PublicProcurement #AISecurity #SyntheticData #GovTech #DifferentialPrivacy #AIInnovation

segment.source:
ūüŹÜ CUBIG Wins Startup World Cup Seoul Finals, Heads to Silicon Valley Grand Finale

Hello, we are CUBIG, a leading company in secure synthetic data solutions.

We are thrilled to announce that CUBIG has won the Startup World Cup 2025 Seoul regional finals, earning the opportunity to compete in the global Grand Finale this October in Silicon Valley


ūüĆć What Is the Startup World Cup?

The Startup World Cup, sponsored by Pegasus Tech Ventures, is one of the largest startup pitch competitions worldwide.

Marking its 10th year, the event brings together 50,000+ attendees, 2,500 investors, and 500 speakers each year.

Competing for a grand prize of $1 million ūüíį, winning the Seoul finals highlights CUBIG‚Äôs technological excellence and global growth potential


ūüĒź CUBIG‚Äôs Innovation and Expertise

Founded in 2021, CUBIG develops next-generation data solutions that enable high-performance AI training without exposing personal data.

Our core technologies include:

  • DTS ‚ÄĒ a multimodal and domainless synthetic data generator

  • DataXpert ‚ÄĒ a synthetic data-based agent platform

  • LLM Capsule ‚ÄĒ a privacy-preserving solution preventing sensitive data leakage in public LLMs

These solutions are tailored for high-risk industries such as finance ūüí≥, healthcare ūüŹ•, defense ūüõ°ÔłŹ, and government ūüŹõÔłŹ


‚úąÔłŹ On the Road to Silicon Valley

With the global Grand Finale scheduled for October 15‚Äď17 in Silicon Valley, CUBIG is preparing to showcase achievements on the international stage.

CEO Ho Bae stated:

‚ÄúWe saw the Startup World Cup as the fastest path to entering the U.S. market, and we will focus on expanding our technologies and services globally.‚ÄĚ

CUBIG remains committed to driving secure and innovative AI ecosystems, building global trust together with our partners and customers.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüŹÜ CUBIG‚Äôs DTS Wins User Excellence at Human Technology Awards

Hello, we are CUBIG, the team behind DTS ‚ÄĒ an accessible, secure platform for generating high-quality synthetic data.

We‚Äôre pleased to share that DTS received the User Excellence Award at the 10th Human Technology Awards.

This recognition highlights our ability to reconcile two competing goals ‚ÄĒ privacy protection ūüĒź and AI advancement ūü§Ė ‚ÄĒ while enabling real-time creation of analysis-ready datasets without touching raw data.

With both web and on-prem options, DTS fits security-sensitive organizations that must keep data within internal boundaries.

ūüöÄ Solving the Privacy‚ÄďAI Trade-off with Synthetic Data

DTS generates realistic datasets that preserve the statistical properties and distributions ūüďä of source data ‚ÄĒ without direct access to the originals.

Non-developers can create and use datasets via simple, mouse-driven interactions ūüĖĪÔłŹ and immediately feed them into analytics and model training.

This design lowers adoption barriers in regulated environments while improving data accessibility, model quality, and security posture.

As a result, teams accelerate AI initiatives and reduce risks in handling sensitive information.


ūüß© Proven Impact Across Real-World Use Cases

CUBIG‚Äôs technology has been validated in high-risk settings, including a pilot with the Air Force ‚úąÔłŹ where exports are restricted.

Collaborations with NAVER and SK Telecom demonstrate practical value in privacy-safe data sharing, vendor collaboration, and AI training.

Synthetic data serves as a bridge between compliance and innovation, delivering analysis outcomes without weakening internal controls.

Adoption is expanding across industries as organizations establish synthetic data as a new operational standard.


ūüĆĪ Advancing the Product Ecosystem and Global Reach

Beyond DTS, CUBIG is building a broader stack:

  • azoo: A no-code synthetic data platform.

segment.source:
ūüŹõÔłŹ CUBIG Supports Public Institutions with Synthetic Data Compliance Solution

CUBIG has introduced its Data Transform System (DTS) to help public institutions in Korea meet the newly revised government evaluation framework, which now includes ‚Äúsynthetic data openness performance‚ÄĚ as a key metric.

This move comes as agencies are required to generate and share synthetic datasets without exposing sensitive original data.

Addressing the Challenges of Public Sector Data Compliance ‚öĖÔłŹ

Generating synthetic data typically requires AI expertise, security design, and advanced infrastructure ‚ÄĒ resources many public institutions lack.

Outsourcing or cloud-based generation is often restricted due to security concerns.

CUBIG‚Äôs DTS solves this with its Non-Access technology ūüĒź, enabling secure transformation of text, tables, documents, and images into high-quality synthetic data without ever touching the raw data.


Easy Deployment and Enhanced Productivity ‚ö°

With a user-friendly GUI, DTS can be used without dedicated developers and is compatible with closed-network (air-gapped) environments.

It also integrates with GPT and RAG-based analysis tools ūü§Ė, helping public institutions not only meet compliance metrics but also drive digital transformation and administrative automation.


CUBIG is currently offering consulting and pilot programs tailored to government agencies, ensuring smooth adoption and measurable results.

By deploying DTS, institutions can simultaneously achieve compliance, improve AI adoption, and modernize public administration.


ūüďé Read more

segment.source:
ūüŹÜ CUBIG Wins ‚ÄúAI Medical Innovation Award‚ÄĚ at AI EXPO KOREA 2025

We‚Äôre proud to share that CUBIG has been awarded the AI Medical Innovation Award at the 2025 AI Excellence Summit, held during AI EXPO KOREA 2025 in Seoul.

This recognition highlights our breakthrough in addressing one of the most critical challenges in healthcare AI: balancing patient data security ūüĒź with meaningful data utilization.

ūüďä Differential Privacy at the Core

At the heart of CUBIG‚Äôs technology is a Differential Privacy-based synthetic data engine.

This approach mathematically transforms sensitive patient data, preserving statistical value for AI training while ensuring that individual information can never be inferred.

It goes far beyond traditional de-identification or anonymization, setting a new global standard ūüĆć for safe medical data use.


ūüß¨ Unlocking Multimodal Healthcare Data

CUBIG‚Äôs solution enables the integration and analysis of multimodal medical data ‚ÄĒ including images ūü©Ľ, clinical text ūüďĄ, and numerical records ūüďä.

By leveraging synthetic personas that retain key patient characteristics, our technology empowers applications in clinical research, drug development, and precision medicine.


ūüí° Driving AI Transformation in Healthcare

This award reaffirms CUBIG‚Äôs role as a key enabler of AI transformation across the pharmaceutical and biotech industries.

From disease pattern analysis to treatment response prediction and virtual patient simulations, our synthetic data technology makes what was once impossible with traditional methods now achievable.

segment.source:
ūüĒź Strengthening AI Security: CUBIG‚Äôs Synthetic Data and LLM Capsule

Concerns over Large Language Model (LLM) security are rapidly growing.

Recent cases ‚ÄĒ such as DeepSeek‚Äôs AI model being banned in certain countries and OpenAI‚Äôs data collection practices ‚ÄĒ highlight the risks of data breaches ūüĒď, unauthorized storage, and hidden backdoors.

This poses a serious threat to both enterprises and individual users.


‚ö†ÔłŹ Why Stronger AI Security Is Needed

While some companies are attempting to build their own secure LLMs, this is not a complete solution.

  • Sensitive training data can still be exposed.

  • Backdoor attacks may compromise even private models.

What‚Äôs needed is a comprehensive approach ūüõ°ÔłŹ that protects not only the models but also the data they learn from.


ūüõ†ÔłŹ CUBIG‚Äôs Solutions: DTS and LLM Capsule

CUBIG addresses these challenges with two core technologies:

  • DTS (Data Transform System): Generates privacy-preserving synthetic data that retains up to 99% of the utility of the original dataset while removing sensitive information.

  • LLM Capsule: Acts as a security filter ūüĒć, detecting and anonymizing personal information at the input stage ‚ÄĒ ensuring safe AI chatbot usage for both enterprises and individuals.

ūü§Ě Building Trust in AI

Users must adopt a more cautious mindset:

  • Avoid inputting sensitive data ūüĒí into AI services.

  • Review data collection and storage policies.

  • Implement protective tools like CUBIG‚Äôs LLM Capsule.

By combining secure synthetic data with real-time filtering, CUBIG is helping shape a safer AI ecosystem where privacy is never compromised.


ūüďé Read more

segment.source:
ūüŹ¶ CUBIG Selected for IBK ‚Äú1st LAB‚ÄĚ 6th Cohort

IBK Industrial Bank of Korea (IBK) has announced the five companies chosen for the 6th cohort of its open innovation testbed program, ‚ÄúIBK 1st LAB.‚ÄĚ

The program provides a platform to experiment with and verify whether external digital innovation technologies can be applied to IBK‚Äôs products, services, and processes


ūü§Ě Open Innovation Testbed

Through IBK 1st LAB, selected companies collaborate with IBK to address internal banking challenges using AI, RPA, and big data technologies.

Each participant receives testing funds, dedicated collaboration space, and IT infrastructure support.

For top-performing companies, additional benefits include commercialization support grants, office space, and participation in Demo Day events (Impact Dive)


ūüĆü 6th Cohort Selection

segment.source:
ūüŹÜ CUBIG‚Äôs DTS Wins 2024 Information Security Innovation Award


We are proud to announce that CUBIG‚Äôs DTS (Data Transform System) has been awarded at the 2024 Information Security Product Innovation Awards.

DTS is a synthetic data solution that enables enterprises to generate data locally without transmitting sensitive information to external servers ūüĒź ‚ÄĒ achieving up to 99% performance similarity ‚ö° to the original data while ensuring privacy and security.


Why DTS Matters ūüí°

DTS overcomes regulatory barriers ‚öĖÔłŹ that often restrict data usage, empowering organizations to harness sensitive data safely without compromising compliance.

In just three months since its launch, DTS has already secured multiple Proof-of-Concept (PoC) projects with major enterprises, demonstrating its market potential across finance ūüíį, healthcare ūüŹ•, and large language model (LLM) applications ūü§Ė.


Security and Usability Combined ūüĒź

By integrating Differential Privacy and non-access data technologies, DTS eliminates any risk of re-identification.

At the same time, its intuitive drag-and-drop interface ūüĖĪÔłŹ ensures that even non-technical users can generate and analyze synthetic data with ease.

This recognition underscores CUBIG‚Äôs technical excellence and market value. We remain committed to helping enterprises unlock the full potential of their data securely and efficiently.

segment.source:
ūüöÄ CUBIG‚Äôs Synthetic Data Solution ‚ÄúSynFlow‚ÄĚ Selected for Korea‚Äôs Scale-Up TIPS Program

We‚Äôre thrilled to announce that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has been selected for the Scale-Up TIPS program by the Ministry of SMEs and Startups in Korea.

With this milestone, CUBIG will receive up to KRW 1.2 billion (approx. USD 900K) in R&D funding over the next three years to accelerate the commercialization and advancement of SynFlow.


ūüĒ¨ What Is SynFlow?

SynFlow is CUBIG‚Äôs next-generation synthetic data solution that overcomes the limitations of traditional data combination methods.

Its core strength lies in generating advanced persona-preserving synthetic data ūüĎ§, enabling organizations to combine datasets securely without compromising performance.

Unlike conventional pseudonymization methods, SynFlow eliminates issues such as performance degradation, processing delays, and reduced data usability.


ūüí° Why It Matters

  • Secure by design ūüĒź: Data owners generate synthetic datasets themselves, without exposing raw data externally.

  • Faster processing ‚ö°: Combination cycles reduced to within one week.

  • Cross-industry applicability ūüĆć: From finance and healthcare to government and public institutions, SynFlow ensures safe, efficient, and scalable data use.

segment.source:
ūüĒź CUBIG: Delivering High-Quality Synthetic Data Without Exposing Sensitive Information

We‚Äôre excited to share how CUBIG, the synthetic data company, is redefining the future of AI training data with our Differential Privacy-powered synthetic data solutions.


‚öĖÔłŹ Solving the Quality vs. Security Dilemma

Traditional synthetic data often faces a trade-off: better accuracy at the cost of weaker security, or stronger protection with reduced data quality.

CUBIG eliminates this problem by never accessing raw data directly. Instead, our technology leverages only statistical attributes ūüďä, enabling synthetic data that is both secure and high-performing.


ūüõ†ÔłŹ DTS & AZOO: Unlocking Safe Data Use

  • DTS (Data Transform System): A SaaS and on-premise solution that allows enterprises to safely generate synthetic data within their own infrastructure.

  • AZOO Marketplace: A platform where organizations can generate, validate, trade, and analyze synthetic data ‚ÄĒ all without exposing sensitive information.

These solutions empower industries such as finance ūüíį, defense ūüõ°ÔłŹ, and healthcare ūüŹ• to overcome regulatory barriers and leverage data safely for AI innovation.


ūü§Ě Backed by Strong Partners and Investors

CUBIG has partnered with Naver, SK Telecom, and the Air Force ‚úąÔłŹ on Proof of Concept projects, while securing investment from Naver D2SF, Korea Development Bank, and CNTTech.


With mentorship and support from Seoul Business Agency (SBA), we‚Äôve strengthened our business model and accelerated growth.


ūüďé Read more

segment.source:
ūüíľ CUBIG Attracts Investment from IBK Capital and Intops Investment


CUBIG, the synthetic data security company, has secured new funding from IBK Capital and Intops Investment.

This comes just two months after being selected as an innovation startup by IBK Changgong, adding to earlier investments from Naver and KDB Bank. With IBK Financial Group now on board, CUBIG continues to strengthen its network of strategic investors.


ūüí° Pre-Series A Round

According to the investment banking industry, CUBIG launched its Pre-Series A round last month to attract financial investors. CNTTech and KDB Bank participated in the round, purchasing newly issued RCPS shares.

IBK Capital and Intops Investment later joined with a slightly higher valuation, using the ‚ÄúIBKC-INTOPS New Technology Business Investment Partnership No.3‚ÄĚ fund vehicle.


ūüĒź Technology Focus

Founded in 2021, CUBIG specializes in synthetic data powered by Differential Privacy (DP). Unlike traditional methods that require sharing original data with external servers, CUBIG‚Äôs solution generates synthetic datasets without exposing sensitive records ‚ÄĒ providing superior security while maintaining the advantages of synthetic data.

This technology is especially valuable in industries handling sensitive information such as finance, healthcare, and telecommunications. Multiple enterprises and institutions are currently engaged in PoC (Proof of Concept) projects with CUBIG.


ūüďą Market Growth

Synthetic data is gaining attention as a critical enabler for AI development. In 2022, it was listed among MIT‚Äôs Top 10 Breakthrough Technologies.

According to Grand View Research, the global synthetic data generation market was valued at USD 120 million in 2021 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 34.8% from 2022 to 2030.


With rising demand, CUBIG is well positioned to capture opportunities in this rapidly expanding market.

CUBIG plans to use the newly raised funds to enhance its services and accelerate overseas expansion. Investors expect significant revenue growth to begin in 2025.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį

segment.source:
ūüŹÜ CUBIG Wins ‚ÄúBest of Demo Day‚ÄĚ at 2024 AI Security Day

We‚Äôre proud to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has been awarded Best of Demo Day at the 2024 AI Security Day, hosted by the Ministry of Science and ICT and KISA (Korea Internet & Security Agency).

This award highlights CUBIG‚Äôs innovation in Differential Privacy (DP)-powered synthetic data, setting a new benchmark for secure ūüĒź and high-performance ‚ö° AI data solutions.

ūüíĽ Our Solutions: DTS & AZOO

At the event, CUBIG showcased two core products:

  • DTS (Data Transform System): A SaaS solution that allows anyone to generate synthetic data locally with drag-and-drop simplicity, without exposing raw information.

  • AZOO Marketplace: A secure web platform where enterprises can trade, analyze, and evaluate the quality of synthetic datasets ‚ÄĒ all while ensuring privacy and compliance.


ūüĆü Why We Stood Out

Unlike conventional methods that require direct access to raw data, CUBIG‚Äôs approach uses data non-access with Differential Privacy.

This ensures that sensitive information is never exposed ūüĒí while maintaining State-of-the-Art (SOTA) performance ‚ÄĒ even surpassing leading global solutions ūüĆć.


Following a successful Pre-A funding round led by Korea Development Bank, CUBIG is actively preparing for global expansion.

With ongoing collaborations and growing partnerships, we are committed to diversifying our solutions and building a safer, more innovative synthetic data ecosystem.


ūüďé Read more

ūüí° CUBIG Secures Pre-Series A Funding from CNTTech‚ÄďDB Dream Big Fund


We‚Äôre excited to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has raised its Pre-Series A round from the CNTTech‚ÄďDB Dream Big Investment Fund, jointly established by accelerator CNTTech and DB Capital, the venture arm of DB Group.

This funding validates CUBIG‚Äôs unique technology ūüöÄ and strong potential ūüĆć in the rapidly expanding global synthetic data market.


Our Technology Advantage ūüĒź

CUBIG‚Äôs synthetic data solution is powered by Differential Privacy (DP), ensuring that original datasets cannot be reverse-engineered.

Users can easily generate secure synthetic data without coding skills, and importantly, all data can be created safely within internal servers ūüĖ•ÔłŹ ‚ÄĒ without uploading sensitive information to external clouds ‚ėĀÔłŹ.

This makes CUBIG‚Äôs solution ideal for industries like finance ūüíį, healthcare ūüŹ•, and public services ūüŹõÔłŹ, where strict data security and compliance are essential.


Growing Global Demand ūüĆŹ

As demand for AI training data surges worldwide ūüďą, synthetic data has become a critical enabler to address data scarcity.

Industry leaders recognize that CUBIG stands out by delivering both high-quality performance and strengthened security ūüĒí in synthetic data generation.

With this investment, we are accelerating our mission to expand globally ūüĆć, monetize faster ūüí°, and empower enterprises with privacy-first AI data solutions.


CUBIG is committed to building a safer, more efficient data ecosystem ‚ÄĒ one where sensitive information remains protected while fueling the next wave of AI innovation.

We‚Äôre excited to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has raised its Pre-Series A round from the CNTTech‚ÄďDB Dream Big Investment Fund, jointly established by accelerator CNTTech and DB Capital, the venture arm of DB Group.

This funding validates CUBIG‚Äôs unique technology ūüöÄ and strong potential ūüĆć in the rapidly expanding global synthetic data market.


Our Technology Advantage ūüĒź

CUBIG‚Äôs synthetic data solution is powered by Differential Privacy (DP), ensuring that original datasets cannot be reverse-engineered.

Users can easily generate secure synthetic data without coding skills, and importantly, all data can be created safely within internal servers ūüĖ•ÔłŹ ‚ÄĒ without uploading sensitive information to external clouds ‚ėĀÔłŹ.

This makes CUBIG‚Äôs solution ideal for industries like finance ūüíį, healthcare ūüŹ•, and public services ūüŹõÔłŹ, where strict data security and compliance are essential.


Growing Global Demand ūüĆŹ

As demand for AI training data surges worldwide ūüďą, synthetic data has become a critical enabler to address data scarcity.

Industry leaders recognize that CUBIG stands out by delivering both high-quality performance and strengthened security ūüĒí in synthetic data generation.

With this investment, we are accelerating our mission to expand globally ūüĆć, monetize faster ūüí°, and empower enterprises with privacy-first AI data solutions.


CUBIG is committed to building a safer, more efficient data ecosystem ‚ÄĒ one where sensitive information remains protected while fueling the next wave of AI innovation.

segment.source:
ūüĒź CUBIG Develops Differential Privacy-Based Synthetic Data Solution

We‚Äôre excited to share that CUBIG, the synthetic data company, has developed its own synthetic data solution powered by Differential Privacy (DP) ‚ÄĒ providing a secure alternative for handling sensitive data in the age of AI.


ūüí° Why It Matters

Traditional synthetic data solutions often face a trade-off: high performance but poor security, or stronger protection but limited usability.

CUBIG‚Äôs new approach eliminates this dilemma by integrating Differential Privacy, the same advanced algorithm used by the US Census Bureau and leading global tech companies.


ūüŹÜ SOTA Performance and Security

Our DP-based solution maintains State-of-the-Art (SOTA) levels in both performance and protection.

Once applied, the privacy guarantees remain intact, ensuring that sensitive records cannot be reconstructed or re-identified.

This not only minimizes legal risks but also provides strong resistance against re-identification and reconstruction attacks.


ūüĆŹ Cubig DTS

‚ÄúOur solution proves that synthetic data can be both powerful and safe,‚ÄĚ said Bae Ho, CEO of CUBIG.

‚ÄúAs we expand globally, we will continue to prioritize privacy and sensitive data security, positioning CUBIG as a leader in the next generation of synthetic data technologies.‚ÄĚ

With this breakthrough, CUBIG reaffirms its mission to create a safer, more responsible data ecosystem ‚ÄĒ enabling enterprises and institutions to innovate without compromise.


ūüďé Read more
Read the full article(Click)ūüďį
